title: Applying Pythagorean Identity
text: Recall the Pythagorean identity relating sine and cosine: $${sin}^2 \theta+{cos}^2 \theta=1$$

title: Rearrange into Quadratic Form
text: Substitute the identity and rearrange the equation into a quadratic form in terms of cos(θ).

title: Solve the Quadratic and Find Angles
text: Solve the quadratic equation for cos(θ) and then find the values of θ in the interval $$(0,2\pi)$$.
